items.title: Commit the watchdog error-logging fix — just run: git add server.js lib/watchdog/WatchdogManager.js && git commit -m 'fix: log watchdog tick errors before emitting'

reward.content: The Apollo 11 guidance computer had only 74 KB of memory — less than a single modern email attachment — yet it navigated humans to the Moon and back.

items.title: git add open-claude-appv2.sh and commit it (or add to .gitignore if it's personal)

reward.content: Octopuses have three hearts and blue blood — two hearts pump blood to the gills, while the third pumps it to the rest of the body.

items.title: Set up a git remote — run: git remote add origin <your-repo-url>

reward.content: The entire internet weighs about as much as a strawberry — roughly 50 grams — calculated from the electrons in motion carrying all the data.

items.title: Push master to remote — just: git push -u origin master
Merge master into main — the 'SWITCH TO v2' verdict plus all refactors are sitting unmerged

reward.content: A day on Venus is longer than a year on Venus — it takes 243 Earth days to rotate once but only 225 Earth days to orbit the Sun.

items.title: Remove the hardcoded droplet IP (142.93.181.243) from open-claude-appv2.sh — move it to an env var or SSH config alias
Commit the data files — run: git add data/todos/ data/watchdog-state.json && git commit -m 'chore: update todo and watchdog state'

reward.content: satisfying CNC machine cutting metal compilation

items.title: Create a CLAUDE.md in the project root with build/test/lint commands so future sessions start faster

reward.content: Honey never spoils — archaeologists have found 3,000-year-old honey in Egyptian tombs that was still perfectly edible.
